if warmup_steps <= 0:\\n        return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\\n    warmup = optim.lr_scheduler.LinearLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        start_factor=0.2,\\n        end_factor=1.0,\\n        total_iters=warmup_steps,\\n    )\\n    cosine = optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1),\\n    )\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.SequentialLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        schedulers=[warmup, cosine],\\n        milestones=[warmup_steps],\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed-step budget more effectively with a budget-aware warmup+cosine schedule, while pairing it with AdamW and a higher learning rate to improve loss reduction within only 256 updates.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
